title: Inventory Full
description: A simple plugin to notify players when their inventory is full
body:
![This project proudly suppports the LGBTQIA+ community](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OakLoaf/OakLoaf/refs/heads/main/assets/pride.png)

![Header](https://imgur.com/OmpIxDF.png)

## Inventory Full
A simple plugin to notify players when their inventory is full

### Commands
- /invfull reload - Reload the plugin
- /invfull update - Update the plugin

### Permissions
- inventoryfull.reload - Allow player  to reload the plugin
- inventoryfull.update- Allow player to update the plugin


### Config

<details>
<summary>Default Config</summary>

```yaml
# Type of message to send (Options: MESSAGE, ACTION, TITLE)
message-type: "message"
# How often (in ticks) to check inventories
period: 200

messages:
  prefix: ""
  inventory-full: "&cYour inventory is full!"
  no-permissions: "&#ff6969Insufficient permissions"
  reload: "&#b7faa2InventoryFull has been reloaded &#66b04f🔃"
```

</details>


If you have a bug to report or need help setting up your plugin join the [Discord Support Server](https://discord.gg/p3duRZsZ2f)

Have a wonderful day :)
